overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval fortress at night. The character moves from an open cliffside path through a stone tunnel into a torch-lit courtyard with ornate temple architecture, passing guards and burning braziers along the way.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the cliffside path toward the tunnel entrance, passing guards with torches

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor holding a torch, standing watch by the path

entered.detail: tall stone tower with small windows perched on the cliff edge
dark ocean water visible beyond the cliff edge under night sky
cobblestone path winding along the cliffside
burning fire pit with wooden frame illuminating the path
large stone archway leading into the fortress interior

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open cliffside path at night, with a stone tower visible on the left and the ocean stretching to the right. Torches burn in wooden braziers along the path, and a guard stands watch near the entrance to a stone tunnel ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone tunnel passage with wooden door at end

events.description: enters covered stone tunnel from open cliffside, sky becomes obscured
large wooden door at tunnel end opens revealing bright courtyard beyond

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the narrow stone tunnel toward the wooden door at the far end

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls forming the tunnel passage
wooden cart with barrels parked against the tunnel wall
wooden barrel next to the cart
large reinforced wooden door with metal brackets at tunnel end
torch mounted on stone wall providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow stone tunnel with rough walls illuminated by wall-mounted torches. Geralt walks past a wooden cart and barrels toward a large reinforced wooden door at the far end, which opens at the segment's conclusion to reveal the courtyard beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress courtyard with ornate temple building and burning braziers

events.description: exits tunnel through wooden door into open torch-lit courtyard
descends stone stairs leading down into the main courtyard area

agents.ego_description: Geralt exits the tunnel and explores the courtyard, descending stairs and walking toward the ornate building

entered.detail: large multi-story stone building with golden lighting and arched windows
wide stone staircase leading down into the courtyard
large burning brazier with flames rising high
small covered stone structure with arched openings

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the tunnel into a spacious courtyard dominated by an ornate temple-like building with warm golden lights. He descends stone stairs past burning fire braziers, with the wooden door now behind him and the grand structure rising ahead against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, windswept cliffside into the enclosed, torch-lit heart of a medieval fortress. It begins with Geralt walking along a coastal path flanked by a stone tower and the ocean, passing burning wooden braziers and a guard stationed at a tunnel entrance. As the camera follows him inside, the open night air is replaced by the oppressive walls of a narrow stone tunnel illuminated by flickering torches and cluttered with wooden carts and barrels. The scene then shifts as a reinforced wooden door swings open, releasing the camera from the tunnel into a spacious courtyard. Finally, the view expands to reveal an ornate temple-like building glowing with warm golden lights as Geralt descends stone stairs past burning braziers toward the grand structure.
